title: Raccoon Removal in North Merrick, Long Island | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in North Merrick, Long Island. Licensed experts remove raccoons from attics, chimneys & crawl spaces. Call for fast response: $900 – $4,000.
intro: North Merrick residents face unique raccoon challenges due to the area's tree-lined residential streets and proximity to wooded areas near Cammann Street Park and Levy Lakeside Park. Our licensed raccoon removal specialists provide comprehensive services including humane trapping, exclusion, and damage repair for North Merrick homes and businesses. With raccoons increasingly seeking shelter in attics and chimneys throughout this Long Island community, fast professional intervention is essential.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served North Merrick and surrounding Long Island communities for years with licensed, insured technicians who understand local wildlife patterns. We offer same-day emergency response, humane removal methods, complete attic restoration, and warranty-backed exclusion work to keep raccoons out permanently.
localContext: North Merrick's classic Cape Cod and ranch-style homes with accessible attics and chimneys make them particularly vulnerable to raccoon intrusions, especially in neighborhoods near Merrick Avenue and Jerusalem Avenue. The mature trees throughout the area and proximity to green spaces like Fraser Park provide ideal raccoon habitats, making professional exclusion services critical for homeowners.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in North Merrick typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and extent of attic damage. A basic single raccoon removal with minor repairs starts around $900, while extensive infestations with multiple animals, significant structural damage, and complete attic restoration can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in North Merrick neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in North Merrick due to the area's mature trees, accessible food sources, and residential homes with attics and chimneys. The proximity to parks like Cammann Street Park and wooded areas provides natural habitat, while garbage bins and pet food attract raccoons into residential areas. Spring and fall see the highest activity as raccoons seek denning sites for raising young or winter shelter.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to North Merrick homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause extensive damage to North Merrick homes including torn insulation, chewed electrical wiring, damaged roof vents and soffits, destroyed ductwork, and contamination from urine and feces. They can rip apart attic insulation for nesting, create multiple entry holes in roofs and siding, and their waste can pose health risks including raccoon roundworm. Property damage can easily exceed thousands of dollars if not addressed promptly.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to raccoon problems in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for raccoon emergencies in North Merrick and throughout Long Island. Once you call, we can typically schedule an inspection within 24 hours and begin removal immediately if raccoons are present. Emergency situations such as raccoons in living spaces or aggressive animals receive priority response, often within hours of your call.
